description: Configure Jitsi Meet to disable Peer-to-Peer (P2P) connections, forcing all video traffic through the Jitsi Videobridge (JVB). Apply the setting `config.p2p = { enabled: false };` to the configuration override file at `/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-config.js`. Verify the configuration by joining the room 'Telehealth-Test' as 'Doctor' and 'Patient' in separate windows. Save a screenshot to `/home/ga/p2p_disabled_evidence.png` showing both participants and the connection status details to document the transport type.
